use_cases: Uploading profile pictures or avatar images in user settings
Submitting document attachments in forms like applications or support tickets
Adding media files such as images or videos to content
Uploading files for data import or bulk operations in admin panels
Attaching files in messaging or collaboration applications
ai_summary: A file upload button component built with Radix UI Slot and Tailwind CSS, supporting multiple variants and sizes through class-variance-authority. Provides a flexible, accessible file input trigger with standard button styling patterns suitable for various web applications.
